fields.name: Business Unit Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the business unit that the analysis view is based on.

fields.name: Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account that the analysis entry comes from.

fields.name: Dimension 1 Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value you selected for the analysis view dimension that you defined as Dimension 1 on the analysis view card.

fields.name: Dimension 2 Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value you selected for the analysis view dimension that you defined as Dimension 2 on the analysis view card.

fields.name: Dimension 3 Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value you selected for the analysis view dimension that you defined as Dimension 3 on the analysis view card.

fields.name: Dimension 4 Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value you selected for the analysis view dimension that you defined as Dimension 4 on the analysis view card.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the G/L entry number for an analysis view entry if you have selected period None in the Date Compression field on the analysis view card. In other words, if you did not select a date compression period, each G/L entry will result in an analysis view entry.
The contents of this field cannot be changed.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the analysis view budget entry.

fields.name: Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent debits.

fields.name: Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent credits.

fields.name: Add.-Curr. Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies (in the additional reporting currency) the VAT difference that arises when you make a correction to a VAT amount on a sales or purchase document.

fields.name: Add.-Curr. Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies, in the additional reporting currency, the amount of the debit entry.

fields.name: Add.-Curr. Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies, in the additional reporting currency, the amount of the credit entry.

fields.name: Account Source
fields.tooltip: Specifies an account that you can use as a filter to define what is displayed in the Analysis by Dimensions window.

fields.name: Cash Flow Forecast No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number for the cash flow forecast.
